application.read.all.note: Read all app registrations and SPs

application.readwrite.all.note: Manage all app registrations - the apex of OAuth persistence

application.readwrite.ownedby.note: Manage app registrations the SP owns - scoped persistence

approleassignment.readwrite.all.note: Grant/revoke role assignments to apps. Privilege escalation.

auditlog.read.all.note: Read tenant audit logs - covers tracks / monitors defenders

calendars.readwrite.note: Read/write calendar. Used to send AiTM phishing meeting invites

channelmessage.read.all.note: Read all Teams channel messages tenant-wide

channelmessage.send.note: Send channel messages as user - internal phishing

chat.read.all.note: Read every chat in the tenant (app-only). Massive data exposure.

chat.readwrite.note: Read/write user's chats. Internal phishing vector via Teams.

contacts.read.note: Read user's contacts - target list for follow-on phishing

contacts.readwrite.note: Read/write contacts - persistence vector for impersonation

delegatedpermissiongrant.readwrite.all.note: Grant OAuth2 delegated permissions to any app. Consent-grant abuse vector.

device.readwrite.all.note: Manage all devices - device-registration persistence vector

devicemanagementconfiguration.readwrite..note: Modify Intune configuration policies - disable controls

devicemanagementmanageddevices.readwrite.note: Manage Intune devices - mass device tampering

directory.accessasuser.all.note: Act as the signed-in user against directory. Effectively unlimited.

directory.read.all.note: Read directory data (users, groups, devices). Heavy recon scope.

directory.readwrite.all.note: Read/write directory. Persistence: can create users, modify groups.

ews.accessasuser.all.note: Exchange Web Services delegated access - heavy in legacy stealer toolchains

exchange.manageasapp.note: App-only Exchange management - granted by attackers in 2022 OAuth-spam abuse campaigns

files.read.all.note: Read all files user has access to (OneDrive + accessible SharePoint)

files.readwrite.all.note: Read/write all files user can access. Bulk exfil + ransomware-prep signature

group.readwrite.all.note: Manage all groups. Persistence via group-based access.

groupmember.read.all.note: Read group membership - org structure recon

identityriskevent.read.all.note: Read identity risk events - tracking detection signals

identityriskyuser.read.all.note: Read which users are flagged risky by Entra ID Protection

imap.accessasuser.all.note: Legacy IMAP delegated access - bypasses modern auth controls

mail.read.note: Read all mail in user's mailbox (delegated) or any mailbox in tenant (app-only)

mail.read.shared.note: Read mail in shared mailboxes the user has access to

mail.readbasic.note: Read basic mail properties (no body) - reconnaissance scope

mail.readwrite.note: Read/write/delete mail. BEC and stealer signature

mail.send.note: Send mail as user. Used for internal phishing / BEC follow-up

mail.send.shared.note: Send mail from shared mailboxes the user has access to

mailboxsettings.read.note: Read mailbox settings - rules, signatures, OOO. Recon for BEC.

mailboxsettings.readwrite.note: Write mailbox settings. Used to create exfil/hide rules.

notes.read.all.note: Read all OneNote notes user can access

notes.readwrite.all.note: Read/write all OneNote notes user can access

offline_access.note: Returns a refresh token. Required for long-lived access. Commonly requested with high-risk scopes in phishing kits.

people.read.note: Read people relevant to user - org reconnaissance

policy.readwrite.authenticationmethod.note: Modify authentication methods policy - disable MFA pre-attack

policy.readwrite.conditionalaccess.note: Modify Conditional Access policies. Used to disable controls before exfil.

policy.readwrite.permissiongrant.note: Modify the consent policy itself - meta-persistence

pop.accessasuser.all.note: Legacy POP delegated access - bypasses modern auth controls

presence.read.all.note: Read presence info for all users

rolemanagement.readwrite.directory.note: Modify Entra role assignments. Lateral movement to admin.

securityevents.read.all.note: Read security alerts - useful for tracking own detection

sites.fullcontrol.all.note: Full control over all SharePoint sites. Maximum file scope.

sites.manage.all.note: Manage SharePoint sites - persistence and permission tampering

sites.read.all.note: Read items in all SharePoint site collections

sites.readwrite.all.note: Read/write items in all SharePoint sites

sites.selected.note: Access only specific SharePoint sites granted via API

smtp.send.note: Legacy SMTP send - bypasses modern auth controls

teamsappinstallation.readwriteforteam.note: Install Teams apps - persistence vector via malicious Teams app

user.export.all.note: Bulk-export user data. GDPR/privacy data-exfil vector.

user.invite.all.note: Invite guest users. Used for sustained external persistence.

user.read.note: Read signed-in user's profile. Standard scope.

user.read.all.note: Read all users' profiles in tenant. Recon scope (T1087.004)

user.readbasic.all.note: Read basic profiles of all users - target enumeration

user.readwrite.all.note: Read/write all user profiles. Lateral movement / persistence.
